title: AddressUpdated
description: Emitted when an existing address validity period is updated.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

personId.description: Unique identifier of the person aggregate.

validFrom.description: Updated start date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

validTo.description: Updated end date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD), or null if open-ended.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.
